title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 21.487 - Public institutions of higher education funding formula, joint committee to develop and implement
text:
21.487.  Public institutions of higher education funding formula, joint committee to develop and implement. — The joint committee on education shall develop a comprehensive funding formula for Missouri public institutions of higher education by December 31, 2013.  The general assembly shall implement a funding formula beginning in fiscal year 2015.
(L. 2012 H.B. 1731 § 2) 
Effective 5-30-12 
Nonseverability clause, 313.836
